title: E001: Add Keystone API types, webhooks & CRD generation
summary: Review #3 following external review #2 by greptile-apps[bot]. The single code change adds `headerFile=../../../../hack/boilerplate.go.txt` to the `//go:generate controller-gen object` directive in `groupversion_info.go`, aligning it with the Makefile's `generate` target. Build, tests, lint, and generation all pass with no diff. The fix is correct and minimal.

tests_checklist.item: Tests exist and pass (`make test OPERATOR=keystone` exits 0)
Edge cases are covered (webhook tests cover all 5 defaults + 5 validation rules)
Generated files are in sync (`make generate` + `make manifests` produce no diff)
`go generate ./...` from package directory produces no diff (validates headerFile path)

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (go:generate directive matches Makefile convention)
Change is minimal and focused (single line edit)
No scope creep (only addresses the external review feedback)

security_checklist.item: No security-relevant changes in this diff

architecture_checklist.item: go:generate headerFile path resolves correctly from api/v1alpha1/ to hack/boilerplate.go.txt
Makefile and go:generate directives are now consistent for object generation

fail_fast_checklist.item: Not applicable — no runtime logic changed

defensive_checklist.item: Not applicable — no input handling changed
